description:
SPEC-tracker-state §5 defines a tracker address as the pair (state_url, state_branch), and §8 specifies 'bl remaster <url> [--branch B]' as the CLI that writes it. bl-8a9a delivered only the resolution and materialization halves: tracker_address::resolve folds state_branch into Address.branch and state_repo::ensure checks that branch out in .balls/state-repo. Every lifecycle path that names the branch — claim_push (push), claim_sync (merge origin/<branch>), commands/sync, commands/half_push, commands/sync_targets, archive_recovery, remaster, remaster_detach — still uses the git_state::STATE_BRANCH = 'balls/tasks' constant. A non-default state_branch therefore materializes a mismatched local branch while all push/fetch traffic targets balls/tasks.

bl-022c gated this: Config::validate (via tracker_address::ensure_supported) now hard-errors a non-default state_branch, so the field is honestly 'not yet supported' rather than silently half-working. This ball is the real feature: remove that gate and wire the branch through.

Scope:
- Resolve the branch from one seam (the Store already resolves the Address at discovery; have it carry the branch, or read the state-repo's checked-out HEAD) and thread it through every consumer of STATE_BRANCH that names the branch in a push/fetch/merge/log refspec. Many log_subjects(state_dir, 'balls/tasks') calls can simply become 'HEAD' since the state branch IS HEAD in .balls/state-repo.
- Add the 'bl remaster <url> --branch B' CLI flag (SPEC §8) so state_branch has a configuration surface — today it is hand-edit-only.
- Add a SPEC §16 conformance test exercising a non-default branch end to end (create → claim → review → close + sync round-trip on a custom branch), per the §16 rule that no refactor lands without its conformance test.
- Delete tracker_address::ensure_supported and its tests once the traffic is wired.

Why this is honest scaffolding, not dead code: the resolution/materialization layer bl-8a9a shipped is correct and SPEC-intended; the gate just prevents the unwired traffic from being reached. This ball completes the feature.
title: Wire state_branch end to end — claim/review/close/sync still hardcode balls/tasks
